title: melicope rotundifolia
intro: Melicope rotundifolia, also known as the Roundleaf Melicope or Yellow Ginger, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the Hawaiian Islands. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Melicope rotundifolia include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Melicope rotundifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine.
